code: export function splitStyles(styles,...filters){if(false&&filters.length===0){console.error('No filters were passed when calling splitStyles');}const newStyles=filters.map(()=>[]);const rest=[];outer:for(const item of Object.entries(styles)){for(let i=0;i<filters.length;i++){if(filters[i](item[0])){newStyles[i].push(item);continue outer;}}rest.push(item);}newStyles.unshift(rest);return newStyles.map(styles=>Object.fromEntries(styles));}
